- Ra daily brief synthesized and rendered (first in 3 days)
- Aether dashboard added to HQ with portfolio/strategy cards
- Aether daily report published to feed
- X-Frame-Options DENY→SAMEORIGIN fixes research iframe
- Nel/Ra daily publish gates (already committed separately)
